---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or gap this feature addresses.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see built?

## Which part of the codebase does this affect?

- [ ] UI only (components, pages, styling)
- [ ] Backend / AI (API routes, Gemini, orchestrator)
- [ ] Both

## Mockup or example

Add a sketch, screenshot, or description of the desired UI/behaviour if helpful.

## Priority

How important is this relative to other work?
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Should have
- [ ] Must have (blocking something)
